revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fbaicon%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Fba}} ==Description== {{fbicon|nation|variant|size=optional}} Produces a flag icon to the wikilinked national football association article. The list of article titles of the national football associations is located at [[:en:Template:Fba/list|Template:Fba/list]]. ;Parameters *''nation'' – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''old'' (optional) - When given a value (e.g. "yes"/"y"/"1"), will link to the country's former football association (only applies to Brunei and Kenya) ==Examples== *{{fbaicon|Argentina}} → {{fbaicon|Argentina}} *{{fbaicon|ENG}} → {{fbaicon|ENG}} *{{fbaicon|Italy|1861}} → {{fbaicon|Italy|1861}} *{{fbaicon|USA|1776}} → {{fbaicon|USA|1776}} *{{fbaicon|Kenya}}{{fbaicon|Kenya|old=yes}} → {{fbaicon|Kenya}}{{fbaicon|Kenya|old=yes}} ==Alternative to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using lua modules instead: * {{module link|flag|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can reduce the include size when invoked directly. For basic use, {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''country''}} can be replaced with {{mlx|flag|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''country''}}. ==Parameters== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Nation", "description": "Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by FIFA", "example": "Argentina", "type": "string", "required": true }, "variant": { "aliases": [ "2" ], "label": "Flag variant", "description": "Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in Category:Country data templates.", "example": "1861", "type": "string" }, "size": { "label": "Icon size", "description": "Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!)" }, "old": { "label": "Old", "description": "When given a value (e.g. \"yes\"/\"y\"/\"1\"), will link to the country's former football association (only applies to Brunei and Kenya)", "type": "unknown" } }, "description": "Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football association article.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "variant", "size", "old" ], "format": "inline" } ==See also== *[[Template:fba]] – for rendering a flag icon attached with the nation name, wikilinked national football association article. *[[Template:fbicon]] – for linking flags to men's national football teams {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Fba}} ==Description== {{fbicon|nation|variant|size=optional}} Produces a flag icon to the wikilinked national football association article. The list of article titles of the national football associations is located at [[:en:Template:Fba/list|Template:Fba/list]]. ;Parameters *''nation'' – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''old'' (optional) - When given a value (e.g. "yes"/"y"/"1"), will link to the country's former football association (only applies to Brunei and Kenya) ==Examples== *{{fbaicon|Argentina}} → {{fbaicon|Argentina}} *{{fbaicon|ENG}} → {{fbaicon|ENG}} *{{fbaicon|Italy|1861}} → {{fbaicon|Italy|1861}} *{{fbaicon|USA|1776}} → {{fbaicon|USA|1776}} *{{fbaicon|Kenya}}{{fbaicon|Kenya|old=yes}} → {{fbaicon|Kenya}}{{fbaicon|Kenya|old=yes}} ==Alternative to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using lua modules instead: * {{module link|flag|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can reduce the include size when invoked directly. For basic use, {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''country''}} can be replaced with {{mlx|flag|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''country''}}. ==Parameters== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Nation", "description": "Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by FIFA", "example": "Argentina", "type": "string", "required": true }, "variant": { "aliases": [ "2" ], "label": "Flag variant", "description": "Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in Category:Country data templates.", "example": "1861", "type": "string" }, "size": { "label": "Icon size", "description": "Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!)" }, "old": { "label": "Old", "description": "When given a value (e.g. \"yes\"/\"y\"/\"1\"), will link to the country's former football association (only applies to Brunei and Kenya)", "type": "unknown" } }, "description": "Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football association article.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "variant", "size", "old" ], "format": "inline" } ==See also== *[[Template:fba]] – for rendering a flag icon attached with the nation name, wikilinked national football association article. *[[Template:fbicon]] – for linking flags to men's national football teams {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
